articles.author: Katie Campione
articles.title: WGA Reveals Details Of Its Studio Deal: Health Plan Takes Precedence As Writers Hold The Line On Other Key Issues - Deadline
articles.description: The Writers Guild of America East and West revealed some of the details of the new tentative agreement with the studios and streamer.
articles.content: After securing the confidence of their boards of directors, the Writers Guild of America East and West on Wednesday revealed the details of the new tentative agreement with the studios and streamers,… [+4556 chars]
